action.reasoning: Observation: Previous iteration failed because TSR.render() doesn't accept custom cameras. Analysis: Signed render signature only takes n_views, elevation, distance, etc. Need to bypass and use default uniform rendering for baseline eval. Decision: Write inspect.py to study render API, update predict.py to use default render (ignore target cameras), test on one val object, then submit eval to get initial LPIPS baseline.
